story.description: A clip of dogs / puppies: dogs playing in town
story.hook: Dogs can follow a human point fast
story.lead: Dogs aren't just being weird when they sniff butts—that's their ID scan. Each butt gland releases a unique scent cloud with health, mood, even what they ate today. That's why they circle before deciding play or postpone. Did you learn this wrong too?
